summary:
Wiki lint complete. Here's what was fixed:

**Structural fixes (2)**
- Removed broken `[[entities/openswarm]]` in `timelines/2026-05.md` (target doesn't exist)
- Removed self-reference `[[entities/openhands-sdk]]` in `entities/openhands-sdk.md`

**Stale claims (3)**
- Updated `entities/gemini-3-1-pro.md`: noted the Opus 4.6 near-tie was later broken by Opus 4.7 (87.6%); added connection to Opus 4.7
- Updated `topics/llm_models.md`: corrected gpt-5.4 from "flagship" to note superseded by GPT-5.5
- Updated `sources/openai.md`: same gpt-5.4 correction

**Index update (1)**
- Updated `index.md`: corrected gpt-5.4 entity description and bumped `Last updated` to 2026-05-10

**Verification results**
- 160 total pages, 0 broken links, 0 orphan pages
- 94 entities: all valid types, no companies or people
- 0 duplicate pages, 0 weak/unannotated connections
- All 6 topic pages have required sections (Overview, Evolution, Patterns & Insights, Connections)
- Lint entry appended to `wiki/log.md`
